channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] Concept Art Style Hunter
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
"Alright here the Concept Art Style of Hunter, I made this idea for the mod. This was based on the L4D2 Hunter Concept Art, it took it from the Left 4 Dead Wiki for some reason, I tried to make more details and accurate over l4d2 hunter like the concept art, and trying to make look like this... Couldn't figure it out, Until I finished it. I have to the L4D2 Concept Art of Hunter was different than the Final Version, BTW you can look over on Hunter Gallery Archive on Left 4 Dead Wiki until you see about, I hope you enjoy that mod I made... Have Fun!" -SplatterW2007 Steam Workshop Version: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3743899618 GameBanana Version: https://gamebanana.com/mods/685684
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
"Alright here the Concept Art Style of Hunter, I made this idea for the mod. This was based on the L4D2 Hunter Concept Art, it took it from the Left 4 Dead Wiki for some reason, I tried to make more details and accurate over l4d2 hunter like the concept art, and trying to make look like this... Couldn't figure it out, Until I finished it. I have to the L4D2 Concept Art of Hunter was different than the Final Version, BTW you can look over on Hunter Gallery Archive on Left 4 Dead Wiki until you see about, I hope you enjoy that mod I made... Have Fun!" -SplatterW2007 Steam Workshop Version: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3743899618 GameBanana Version: https://gamebanana.com/mods/685684

item.title: [ 4 Maps ] Neon Prime 2069
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Welcome to Neon Prime 2069, a co-op campaign set in the cyber world This is my 4th campaign, first one to be made from scratch, and I hate every minute of it. There is 3 maps, all have similar setting/visual, nothing that could cause epilepsy. Features including some of the concept I really wanted to do, first would be the cyperpunk/retrowave aesthetics, very color full, very eye hurting. 2nd one being an 'easier' type of scavenge event where you dont have to carry gas can around, and instead collecting coins to 'buy' the gas. 3rd is a custom gauntlet event that allows player to be rescued during the finale run, as there are lot of instakill spots. (That should be enough yapping for the description) Optional Music pack Optional install for wether you want to avoid copyright music or just dont want loud music blasting in the game. https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3288658605 (included in the ZIP) Stats: Difficulty rating: MID Average COOP playtime: 30 minutes (no restart). Has basic support for Versus (ladders and script), but untested. Please report any bug you find Map name in the console: neon_prime_01 neon_prime_02 neon_prime_03 Map 1: Metro 2069 The survivors arrive at the trainstation, making their way into The Grid. Map 2: Cyber Oasis Scavenge event. Collect coins and fill up gasoline for the escape vehicle. Fall damage are turned off in this map. Map 3: Outrun Gauntlet finale: Make your way toward the tower where the escape vehicle is waiting. Watch out for dangerous water. Credit: SteelSeries - Some base materials Mr. Who - Skybox texture BetelgeuseMan - Car model Tribes Vengeance - Barrel model Various artists - Music Henrietta - Lab rat 7EMPEST - Mapping, materials/textures, scripts, SFX, VFX
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Welcome to Neon Prime 2069, a co-op campaign set in the cyber world This is my 4th campaign, first one to be made from scratch, and I hate every minute of it. There is 3 maps, all have similar setting/visual, nothing that could cause epilepsy. Features including some of the concept I really wanted to do, first would be the cyperpunk/retrowave aesthetics, very color full, very eye hurting. 2nd one being an 'easier' type of scavenge event where you dont have to carry gas can around, and instead collecting coins to 'buy' the gas. 3rd is a custom gauntlet event that allows player to be rescued during the finale run, as there are lot of instakill spots. (That should be enough yapping for the description) Optional Music pack Optional install for wether you want to avoid copyright music or just dont want loud music blasting in the game. https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3288658605 (included in the ZIP) Stats: Difficulty rating: MID Average COOP playtime: 30 minutes (no restart). Has basic support for Versus (ladders and script), but untested. Please report any bug you find Map name in the console: neon_prime_01 neon_prime_02 neon_prime_03 Map 1: Metro 2069 The survivors arrive at the trainstation, making their way into The Grid. Map 2: Cyber Oasis Scavenge event. Collect coins and fill up gasoline for the escape vehicle. Fall damage are turned off in this map. Map 3: Outrun Gauntlet finale: Make your way toward the tower where the escape vehicle is waiting. Watch out for dangerous water. Credit: SteelSeries - Some base materials Mr. Who - Skybox texture BetelgeuseMan - Car model Tribes Vengeance - Barrel model Various artists - Music Henrietta - Lab rat 7EMPEST - Mapping, materials/textures, scripts, SFX, VFX

item.description:

1 / 3
Este mod no es gran cosa, remplaza a rochelle creditos a sus respectivos autores mod original hecho por El³³⁷Gato (creditos para el al 100%): https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3580257445 modelo hecho originalmente por Nik / ultim8nik: https://payhip.com/ultim8nik

item.title: [ Mod ] FIRE L4D1 SCRIPTS+PARTICLES
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
FUEGO DE LEFT 1 ORIGINAL Y DAÑO PARA L4D2 AL ESTILO L4D1 TODAVIA FALTA POR TERMINAR ESTE TRABAJO PACIENCIA SE IRA ACTUALIZANDO Y DANDO INFORMES EN LA DESCRIPCIÓN
